title: DataGrid FilterBar (medium-term)
description: Per OpenSpec §1.4: Add @svar-ui/svelte-filter FilterBar above Packages grid for multi-field AND/OR filtering.

title: Rules flexibility Phase 2: Dynamic rules
description: Per openspec/proposals/rules-flexibility-extensible-options.md: Add new rules. Backend: accept any package_type in rule_sets (remove PACKAGE_TYPES restriction); ingest defaults to user_data if unknown. Frontend: Add rule button + form; name restricted to ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$.

title: Rules flexibility Phase 3: Delete rules
description: Per openspec/proposals/rules-flexibility-extensible-options.md: Define delete semantics (PATCH rule_sets with null or omit). Handle packages referencing deleted rule (fallback to user_data).

title: Rules flexibility Phase 1: Universal options
description: Per openspec/proposals/rules-flexibility-extensible-options.md: Allow cache_seconds and replicate_to_all on any rule. Backend: relax validation. Frontend: Edit form shows both options for all rules; gray out non-selectable items (cache vs stops mutually exclusive).
